text.content:
◉ Obfuscate

Level 1: Cloak of Shadows

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Become invisible while stationary in an area of shadow or low light. You do not literally vanish — minds simply fail to register your presence. You can be detected by Auspex (Sense the Unseen) or by bumping into someone. Making noise, speaking, attacking, or moving more than a slow shuffle breaks the effect. Does not work in bright light or if someone is already looking directly at you when you activate it.

Level 1: Silence of Death

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Suppress all sounds you produce — footsteps, breathing, rustling clothing, even speech becomes whisper-quiet. You can still choose to speak audibly. Affects only sounds generated by your body and worn equipment. Doesn't silence environmental noise you cause (knocking over a vase, opening a creaky door). Lasts one scene. Combined with Cloak of Shadows, makes you nearly undetectable.

Level 2: Unseen Passage

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Wits + Obfuscate (when interacting with environment) | Type: Utility

Move while remaining invisible. Walk, run, climb — as long as you don't interact with anyone directly, you remain unseen. Opening a door, picking up an object, or bumping into someone may briefly reveal you (Wits + Obfuscate to maintain). You leave no footprints and disturb no curtains. Attacking or speaking breaks the effect. Cameras and electronic surveillance are not fooled unless you also have Ghost in the Machine.

Level 2: Ghost in the Machine

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Extend your Obfuscate to electronic devices — cameras, microphones, motion sensors fail to detect you. You do not appear on recordings, thermal cameras read no heat signature, and motion detectors don't trigger. This is passive while any other Obfuscate power is active. Does not affect live observers watching monitors in real time — only the electronic recording/detection itself.

Level 3: Mask of a Thousand Faces

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Man + Obfuscate | Type: Utility

Appear as a completely different person. You choose the appearance — it can be anyone of roughly your build (1-foot height difference is the maximum). The disguise is mental, not physical — mirrors and cameras show your real face (unless Ghost in the Machine is active). The persona is convincing: face, voice, mannerisms, and even perceived clothing change. People who know the impersonated individual well may get a Wits + Awareness roll to sense something wrong. Creating a specific person's appearance (rather than a generic stranger) requires you to have studied them.

Level 4: Vanish

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Wits + Obfuscate (vs Wits + Auspex if resisted) | Type: Utility

Disappear from plain sight while people are watching you. Unlike Cloak of Shadows, this works in full light and while you are the center of attention. Observers blink and you are simply gone — they can't recall you leaving. This is a reflexive action that can be triggered at any time, even mid-conversation. Once invisible, you function as per Unseen Passage. Extremely useful for escape and dramatic exits. Auspex users contest with Wits + Auspex.

Level 4: Conceal

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Obfuscate | Type: Utility

Make an inanimate object invisible — a car, a coffin, a door, a weapon. The object can be up to the size of a small vehicle. Observers' eyes slide past it as though it doesn't exist. The effect lasts one scene or until you end it. You can conceal an object and walk away — it remains hidden. Touching the concealed object doesn't reveal it, but actively searching for it with Auspex can detect it.

Level 5: Cloak the Gathering

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Wits + Obfuscate | Type: Utility

Extend any of your Obfuscate powers to a group of up to (Wits + Obfuscate) people. Everyone in the group becomes invisible or disguised as you choose. All members must stay within about 10 meters of you — anyone who strays beyond this radius becomes visible. If any member of the group attacks or causes a commotion, only that individual is revealed. Lasts one scene.

Level 5: Impostor's Guise

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Man + Performance | Type: Utility

A perfected version of Mask of a Thousand Faces. You take on the exact appearance of a specific individual you have studied closely (at least 1 hour of observation or a drink of their blood). The disguise includes voice, mannerisms, gait, and even subtle habits. Unlike Mask, this disguise is physical — it fools mirrors, cameras, and even Auspex below level 4. Even intimate associates must roll Wits + Awareness at Difficulty 5 to detect the impersonation. Duration: one night.
